summary: Annotation pre-populate (#2) + source tracking (#3): GroundTruthEvent gains optional source field (predicted/corrected/manual), detector predictions auto-load as editable annotations when no saved ground truth exists, source badges in AnnotationList, prediction snapshot saved on first ground truth save, backend validates source values. 21 tests pass (5 new), typecheck clean.

Research + spec for Waveform Rendering Tuning Page. Deliverables: (1) skills/waveform-rendering.md — domain skill covering psychoacoustics, Pioneer encoding, compensation techniques. (2) specs/feat-waveform-tuning-page/spec.md — full spec with 17 tunable parameters across 3 groups, preset system with YAML storage + REST API, Pioneer reference comparison, component hierarchy, state management, acceptance criteria. (3) Updated MILESTONES.md, CLAUDE.md trigger table, tasks.jsonl with implementation task. No code changes per operator instruction.

Live Event Display: shared useActiveEvents hook + LiveEventDisplay component. Types in activeEvents.ts, hook uses binary search for O(log n) lookups, component shows section band + event flash + upcoming preview. Integrated on AnnotationPage (horizontal) and DeckPanel (vertical, replaces SectionIndicator). useTrackEvents query hook added to tracks.ts. Typecheck clean, visual verification passed. Spec at specs/feat-live-event-display/spec.md, interfaces.md updated.

Produced Song Arrangement Engine proposal. Read 16 input files (CLAUDE.md, LEARNINGS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, MILESTONES.md, interfaces.md, 6 research docs, models.py, events.ts, annotation-followup.md, 2 specs). Asked operator 7 clarifying questions across 2 rounds. Key decisions: tiered pipeline (quick+deep), save stems by default, absorb analysis+annotation into new Arrangement Page, auto-name patterns. Proposal covers: 5-concept data model, Python+TS schemas, pipeline architecture, frontend mockups, Layer 2 integration, naming candidates, 8-phase build path, 6 open questions, risk assessment.

Revised Strata proposal: added Standard tier (stems + existing tools per stem, 1-2 min), critiqued accuracy-vs-overengineering concern (stem separation is NOT over-engineering; it reframes the problem), confirmed Strata name, updated build path to 8 phases with standard tier as Phase 3 sweet spot and deep tier gated on standard tier accuracy.

Second revision: (1) Confirmed 5-concept model. (2) One page with View/Edit mode toggle for /strata. (3) Both quick+standard tiers run by default, stored independently (strata/{fp}.quick.json, strata/{fp}.standard.json), tier comparison in UI. Updated: per-tier storage, tier selector, comparison mode, useActiveEvents tier parameter, API endpoints, config, build path.

Strata Phase 0 implementation. Created scue/layer1/strata/ package (models.py with 12 dataclasses + full serialization, storage.py with per-tier StrataStore). Created scue/api/strata.py with 6 endpoints (list, get-all, get-tier, put-tier, analyze-stub, delete). Wired into main.py. Created frontend types (strata.ts), API hooks (api/strata.ts), StrataPage with track picker + tier selector + summary/empty states. Added /strata route + sidebar link. Typecheck clean, Python imports verified, no build regressions.

Strata Phase 1: Quick tier engine producing real data. Created energy.py (3-band RMS, onset density, pseudo-layer activity via thresholding), patterns.py (M7 DrumPattern clustering via cosine sim, auto-naming like kick-4otf-clap-2+4), transitions.py (energy deltas at boundaries, fill detection from density spikes), engine.py (StrataEngine with analyze_quick). Wired API endpoint. Updated StrataPage with FormulaView (summary, narrative, patterns, transitions, sections). Verified on live track: 12 patterns found, 2 transitions (bass enters +32%, bass drops -21%), 2.2s compute time.

Waveform Rendering Tuning Page: full implementation. Backend: waveform-presets REST API (6 endpoints) with YAML storage at config/waveform-presets.yaml (4 seed presets). Frontend: WaveformTuningPage at /dev/waveforms, ParameterControls (3 groups: frequency/amplitude/color), PresetBar (save/save-as/load/activate/delete), PioneerReferenceWaveform (PWV5 rendering). Modified WaveformCanvas to accept optional renderParams with full rendering pipeline (per-band normalization, amplitude scaling, color modes, gain, saturation, brightness). New waveformPresetStore (Zustand). Active preset integrated app-wide into AnalysisViewer and DeckWaveform. TypeScript strict mode passes.
tests_run: npm run typecheck (pass), python module import (pass)
notes: Pre-existing build errors in AnnotationTimeline, AnnotationToolbar, and bridgeStore.test.ts are unrelated to this change.

summary: Strata Phase 2: Visualization. ArrangementMap canvas (swim-lane), PatternDetailPanel (drum grid + instances), StrataPage updated with WaveformCanvas + ArrangementMap + shared zoom. 2 new files, 1 modified. Typecheck clean.

Strata Phase 3: Interaction polish. Added hover tooltip on ArrangementMap pattern blocks (name, stem, bars, variation), hover highlight (brighter fill + border), cross-highlight between pattern list and map (hoveredPatternId), pattern list click zooms to first instance, transition list click scrolls to timestamp, section row click zooms to section. Cursor changes to pointer on hoverable blocks.

Strata Phase 4: Edit mode. View/Edit toggle in header, blue Edit Mode toolbar with Save/Discard buttons, draft formula state (deep-clone on enter, discard on exit), isDirty tracking (JSON comparison), editable pattern names (inline input fields), editable pattern tags (comma-separated input), useSaveStrata mutation hook (PUT /api/tracks/{fp}/strata/{tier}). Save persists draft to backend and exits edit mode. Fixed runtime crash from replace_all hitting parent component scope.

Strata Phase 5b: Tier Comparison Mode. Added Compare as third page mode (View | Edit | Compare). Created ComparisonView with shared waveform + two stacked ArrangementMaps with tier labels, DiffSummary stats bar (patterns/transitions/layers/complexity deltas), 3-column diff detail panels (pattern/transition/section diffs with +/-/~ indicators). Compare tier selector shown in compare mode with purple accent. Graceful handling when <2 tiers available. Typecheck clean.
notes: Build has pre-existing errors in annotations + bridgeStore test files, unrelated to this change.

summary: Strata Phase 5: Standard Tier Analysis Engine. 3 new modules: separation.py (demucs wrapper with caching), per_stem.py (per-stem energy/events/patterns/activity analysis), updated engine.py with analyze_standard() method. Cross-stem transition detection, transition merging, real stem activity spans. 21 new tests (all pass), 435 total tests pass (0 regressions).

Strata Phase 6: Pioneer Beatgrid Reanalysis + Multi-Source Comparison. (1) Refactored analysis.py: _score_confidence and _run_event_detection renamed to public. (2) Created scue/layer1/reanalysis.py: run_reanalysis_pass() re-runs snap/classify/score/detect with Pioneer grid, produces v3 (source=pioneer_reanalyzed). (3) Extended Strata storage with (fingerprint, tier, source) dimension — backward compat for legacy files. (4) Extended Strata engine with analysis_version parameter. (5) Added API endpoints: POST /reanalyze, GET /versions, source query param on all strata endpoints. (6) Frontend: AnalysisSource type, source selector buttons, reanalyze button, useReanalyze/useTrackVersions hooks. (7) 15 new tests (test_strata_sources.py), 450 total pass. (8) ADR-020, docs/strata-pipeline.md updated. (9) Created docs/agents/PROTOCOL_IMPROVEMENT.md (PIP-001: session-end doc gap, PIP-002: verification handoff). (10) Created .agent/verification-pending.md for cross-session Pioneer hardware verification.
Strata tier analysis UX redesign: backend job tracking, progress polling, multi-select TrackPicker, tier empty states, batch analysis UI

notes: Reverse-engineered Pioneer/BLT waveform color rendering from 22+ reference photos. v4 uses direct amplitude RGB mapping (Low→R, Mid(attenuated)→G, Mid+High→B) with sqrt compression. Also fixed bridge DLP device discovery bug, added Live Monitor zoom+smooth animation, documented in research/waveform-references/PIONEER_COLOR_MODE.md. Shared pioneerColor() utility applied to all 7 waveform render paths.

summary: Fixed demucs.api.Separator import error in separation.py — demucs 4.0.1 doesn't have api module. Replaced with demucs.pretrained.get_model + demucs.apply.apply_model. Verified end-to-end: Standard tier analysis completes in 90s (5 stages, 4 stems, 6 patterns, 30 transitions).
verification: curl triggered Standard analysis, job polled to completion, results visible on Strata page

summary: Full QA pass on 8 features: (1) Sidebar Archive collapsible section PASS, (2) Master-Stem leftPadding alignment PASS, (3) EventTypeToggles color-coded buttons PASS, (4) Tier button states PASS, (5) Stem waveform view PASS, (6) Waveform Tuning re-analyze button PASS, (7) Pattern sub-event diamonds PASS, (8) M7 event fallback PASS. Zero console errors throughout.
verification: preview screenshots + DOM inspection + React props verification

summary: Strata analysis UX improvements: (1) Progress bar replaces empty state panel instead of floating above it, (2) ETA display based on known stage durations, (3) Re-run/Analyze button always visible in tier toolbar, (4) Cooperative cancellation with backend cancel endpoint + cancelled flag + InterruptedError. (5) Pattern Blocks visibility toggle. (6) Stem waveforms default to ON.

Strata Live Tier implemented: backend LiveStrataAnalyzer + PlaybackTracker wiring + WS broadcast + frontend store/dispatch/UI/cursor. 8 files modified, 2 files created. TypeScript clean, 399/400 tests pass (1 pre-existing failure).

Stem-Aware Drum Detector: research (stem-drum-detection.md) → plan → implementation. Created scue/layer1/detectors/percussion_stem.py (StemDrumDetector class, ~350 lines) with multi-band onset detection via librosa.stft + scipy.signal.find_peaks. Three independent frequency bands avoid classification problem entirely. Updated per_stem.py _detect_drum_events() to delegate (87 lines replaced by 5). Added stem_percussion config to detectors.yaml. 15 new tests in test_percussion_stem.py covering kick/snare/hihat detection, simultaneous hits, empty signals, snap-to-grid, pattern fields, config loading. Fixed STFT timing alignment issue (sliding_window_view → librosa.stft center=True). 230 L1 tests pass, 12 skipped, 1 pre-existing failure (unrelated progress_callback mock).

Strata page UX improvements — 9 changes across frontend + backend. Phase 1 (FE-only): (1) Sidebar Archive section with collapsible toggle, (2) Master-stem timeline alignment via WaveformCanvas leftPadding prop matching ArrangementMap LABEL_WIDTH, (3) Event type toggles (EventTypeToggles shared component) with M7 fallback for quick tier, (4) Tier button states — clickable unavailable tiers trigger analysis, dashed borders, pulse animation. Phase 2 (BE+FE): (5) Stem waveform view — RGBWaveform computed per stem in per_stem.py, serialized in StemAnalysis, toggle in Strata page draws RGB bars in swim lanes, (6) Re-analyze button on WaveformTuningPage — parameterized compute_rgb_waveform with custom crossovers, POST recompute-waveform endpoint, (7) Pattern sub-events — diamond markers with white outlines at template event positions across all instances. Bug fixes: (8) Event toggles M7 fallback — useTrackEvents as fallback when strata stem events empty, external events rendered as full-height ticks, (9) Diamond marker visibility — larger (6px) with white stroke. TypeScript clean, 450 Python tests pass, Chrome QA verified.

Brainstormed ingestion vs analysis page architecture. Researched rekordbox local ANLZ files (game-changer: full library without hardware). Implemented: (1) multi-deck scanner refactor with DeckCaptureSlot + queue-based workers, (2) scanner API target_players param, (3) spec update removing multi-deck from non-goals. Provided prompts for parallel agents: PSSI parser, wire PSSI into usb_scanner, local rekordbox library scanner. Updated docs/interfaces.md with scanner API + local library contracts. 220 tests pass, 0 regressions.

Live QA with XDJ-AZ + 2 USBs. Phases 1-5 PASS (smoke, library tab, hardware browsing, single-deck scan, multi-deck scan). 3 bugs found & fixed: (1) slot selector missing in HardwareTab, (2) PPTH parser offset bug in anlz_parser.py, (3) menu item normalization in scanner.py API. 2 open bugs: duplicate React keys in track list, second scan not starting from UI. Phases 6-10 deferred to next session (stop/cancel, scan all, error states, audio tab, cross-tab integration).

QA Ingestion Page phases 6-10 + fix 2 open bugs. Fixed 4 bugs total: (1) duplicate React keys in UsbBrowser.tsx (composite key with index), (2) second scan not starting — root cause: backend only sends scan_progress WS messages, never scan_complete; FE WS handler only called setScanComplete on scan_complete type; hardwareScanInProgress stuck true forever. Fixed ws.ts to detect terminal statuses in scan_progress. (3) FE/BE status enum mismatch: backend sends 'completed'/'failed', FE expected 'complete'/'error'. Aligned types. (4) Added onMutate optimistic update for immediate UI feedback. Phases 6-10 all PASS via parallel static QA review (4 agents). 2 new open bugs logged: per-deck progress fields missing from backend, mid-scan USB removal silent timeouts. TypeScript strict passes. Zero new console errors verified via preview tool.

QA Ingestion Page complete — all 10 phases PASS. Follow-up agent fixed 4 additional bugs: (1) duplicate React keys in UsbBrowser, (2) scan not restarting from UI (root cause: backend never emits scan_complete, only scan_progress with terminal status — FE ws.ts updated to detect this), (3) HardwareScanStatus type enum mismatch (completed vs complete, failed vs error), (4) onMutate optimistic update for immediate UI feedback. 2 open bugs logged as LOW/MEDIUM: per-deck progress missing status/total fields (cosmetic), mid-scan USB removal causes silent timeouts (UX). Total bugs across both sessions: 7 found, 7 fixed, 2 open.

Interactive QA + fix pass for Ingestion Page bugs. Fixed 8 bugs: scroll wheel bleed (passive→native listener), XDJ-AZ triple device + duplicate Deck 1 (dedup by device_number), scan progress dismiss button, selection clear after scan, shift-click range selection, stem label rename (other→synth/fx), TRACK menu routing (flat browse), PLAYLIST routing (folder_id=0). Partially fixed playlist sub-navigation (root works, deeper nav still loops — Java bridge DLP issue). USB hot-swap QA revealed asymmetric slot behavior on XDJ-AZ: slot 1 removal corrupts DLP, slot 2 removal handled gracefully. Bridge crash is the only recovery mechanism — needs resilience work. 5 bugs remain open. Rework needed: bridge resilience (media_change events, graceful DLP recovery), playlist deep navigation, re-scan confirmation dialog.
